'''YVH 1-25A''' was a [[YVH 1]] combat droid developed by [[Tendrando Arms]]. It accompanied [[YVH 1-1A]] onto the vessel ''[[Byrt]]'' during the evacuation of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to rescue [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[Ben Skywalker]] and was destroyed in the attempt by a singularity mine.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
